# Pull Request

## Description
<!-- Provide a brief description of the changes in this PR -->

## Type of Change
<!-- Mark the relevant option with an "x" -->
- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] Refactoring (no functional changes)
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Code quality improvement

## Code Quality Checklist
<!-- Review these items before submitting -->
- [ ] My code follows the project's style guidelines
- [ ] I have checked for and eliminated code duplication
- [ ] I have added/updated tests that prove my fix/feature works
- [ ] New and existing unit tests pass locally
- [ ] I have commented my code, particularly in hard-to-understand areas
- [ ] I have updated the documentation accordingly
- [ ] My changes generate no new warnings or errors
- [ ] I have run linting tools and fixed any issues

## Duplication Check
<!-- Answer these questions about code duplication -->
- [ ] I have reviewed my changes for duplicated code
- [ ] I have checked if similar logic exists elsewhere in the codebase
- [ ] If duplication exists, I have refactored it or documented why it should remain

## Testing
<!-- Describe the tests you ran to verify your changes -->
- [ ] Unit tests
- [ ] Integration tests
- [ ] Manual testing

### Test Configuration:
* Operating System:
* Language/Framework Version:

<!-- Add screenshots to show visual changes -->

## Additional Notes
